titleStmt.title: SII 38.355: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 355. (A.R. No. 355 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the south wall, first prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: ⎯⎯ Year: Śaka 1422. Rautri, Kaṟkaṭaka, śu. di. 7. Friday, Hasta = July 3, 1500 A.D.

summary.p: It records a gift of 500 kuḻi of wet land to the east of a lake at Sembiyamaṅgalam, a village owned by the temple (tirunāmattilkāṇi), a housesite at Dēvikkāpuram and also four nāḻi of rice daily as offerings, (praśādam) to two Gurukkaḷ Kāḷattināthar and Maṟāuaḷḷattirundār, who recite song (pāṭṭu) before the god of the Tirumalaruḍaiyanayiṉār temple at Dēvakkapuram, a paṟṟu (territorial-division) in Palkuṉṟakkōṭṭam in Murugamaṅgalappaṟṟu in Mēlkuṉṟa-nāḍu (a sub-division) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḷamaṇḍalam, by Tirumalai-Nāyakkar and Īśvara-nāyakkar, sons of Eṭṭappa-nāyakkar, for the merit of Narasa-Nāyakka. It was stipulated that atleast one person should recite the song (before the deity).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
subhamastu sakāttam 1000 4 100 2 10 2ṉ melcellā niṉṟa Iravuttiri samvatsarattu kaṟkaṭakanāyiṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu
sattamiyum cukkiṟavāramum peṟṟa Attattunāḷ śrīmat naracāṇāyakkaRead naraca nāyakka Uṭaiyar kāriyattu kaṭavar Īcuranāyakkar
ceyaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu palkuṉṟakoṭṭattu melkuṉṟa nāṭṭu murukamaṅkalappaṟṟu
tevakkāpuram Uṭaiyārtirumalaruṭaiyanayiṉārkku tiruppāṭṭu Otukiṟa kurukkaḷ kiṭṭacceri Uṭaiyār pāramānatevanayiṉār
makaṉāṟ kāḷattinātar(ṟ)kum meṟpaṭi maṟāuḷḷattiruntārkkum Ivviruvarum tirumalar Uṭaiya nayiṉāṟku tiruppāṭṭu Oti tevakkāpuram
Iṉnayiṉār tirunāmattil kāṇi cempiyamaṅkalam Ēri kiḻ nañcai nilattile AñṉuṟuRead aññūṟukuḻiyum peṟṟu tevakkāpurattile Oru
maṉaiyum peṟṟu nāḷ Oṉṟukku nāṉāḻi Aricipiṟacātamumpeṟṟu cantiṟādhittavaraiyum tirumalar Uṭaiyanayiṉāṟku
Iraṇṭu perile Oruttar tiruppāṭṭuotikkoṇṭu cukattile Irukka kaṭava(ā)tākavum Inta taṉmattukku yātoruttar
Akutam paṇṇiThe letter ṇi is written below the line.ṉavarkaḷ keṅkaikkaraiyile kārām pacuvaikkoṉṟa pāvattile poka kaṭaivarkaḷākavuṟRead pokakaṭaivarkaḷākavumcuvāmi naracar nāyakkar Uṭaiyāṟku
taṉmamāka Ettappanāyakkar kumārar tirumalaināyakkarum Īcura nāyakkarum paṇṇiṉa taṉmam .
Digital edition of SII 38.355 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
